description: DRAFT, non-normative (RUN-HIST-01 Part A §3). A marker record naming a corroborated pruned-prefix commitment for one device-subspace chain — the precondition for §L pruning (deleting ing.croft.hist.entry records below the boundary). SHAPE ONLY: history-durability §L's checkpoint CONSTRUCTION stays open, and this sketch does not close, narrow, or prejudge it — the commitment field is a placeholder for whatever the §L construction pins (analogous to Part 2 §7.3.3's verifiable truncation). The spike's B7 guard tests the GATE (no prune without a present, verifiable marker), never the construction.

subspace.description: Hashed device-subspace id of the chain this checkpoint covers.

belowCounter.description: The prune boundary: entries with counter below this are prunable once this record verifies.

prefixHead.description: Digest of the last pruned entry — the anchor reverse validation terminates at instead of walking to genesis (§L).

commitment.description: The corroborated commitment to the pruned prefix. CONSTRUCTION OPEN (§L, Open items) — this field's contents, corroboration rule, and verification are not pinned by this draft.
